zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前价格运行在1660–1680窄幅区间内，整体呈现高位回落后的横盘整理结构。价格持续承压于20日均线1681附近，说明短期多头动能不足，但下方也未出现明显破位，市场进入方向选择阶段，趋势偏弱震荡。

指标方面，MACD仍处于零轴上方但动能柱缩窄，显示上涨动能正在衰减。由于RSI缺失无法辅助判断超买超卖，但结合价格滞于均线下方，可推断短线情绪偏谨慎，资金观望为主，缺乏趋势性突破信号。

支撑位重点关注1660一线，一旦失守可能下探1640甚至1625区域。上方阻力在1681及1700整数关口，只有有效突破并站稳20日均线，才有望重新打开上行空间，否则仍以反弹承压为主。

操作上建议保持区间思路，高抛低吸为主。未突破1681前不宜追多，激进者可在1660附近轻仓试多并严格止损；若跌破支撑则需及时转向空头思路，控制风险优先于方向判断。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Here is a polished technical analysis matching your requested structure and style.

:::writing{variant="document" id="48173"}
Ethereum is trading near 1669.32 after a modest 24-hour decline of 0.54%, remaining below the 20-period simple moving average at 1681.31. This positioning suggests that short-term momentum continues to favor sellers, although the narrow trading range between 1668.53 and 1680.96 indicates consolidation rather than aggressive downside expansion. Until price reclaims the moving average, the prevailing bias remains cautiously bearish with limited volatility.

The available indicators present a mixed technical picture. The MACD value remains positive at 0.9214, implying underlying momentum has not fully deteriorated despite recent weakness, but the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of trend strength. Likewise, the unavailable RSI prevents assessment of overbought or oversold conditions, encouraging traders to rely more heavily on price action and volume before assuming a directional breakout.

Immediate support is developing around the recent session low near 1668.50, with additional downside risk if this level fails to hold under sustained selling pressure. Resistance is concentrated around 1681.30, aligning with the 20-period moving average, while a move above that area could expose the recent high near 1681 and potentially encourage renewed bullish participation. These levels should be monitored closely for confirmation of the next short-term trend.

From a trading perspective, patience may offer the best risk-adjusted approach while Ethereum remains trapped beneath resistance and close to support. Conservative participants could wait for a decisive close above the moving average before considering long exposure, while bearish traders may favor weakness below support with disciplined risk management. Given the incomplete indicator set and compressed price action, strict stop-loss placement and prudent position sizing remain essential.
:::
